caption: A person's hands are seen interacting with an open catalog titled "FEELS LIKE FROST SUITE." The catalog displays various winter-themed stationery and gift sets, featuring floral designs and phrases such as "Yuletide Cheer" and "You warm my heart." In the beginning, two hands press down on a page showing a variety of white and silver products. As the scene progresses, the person uses their left hand to flip the page over to the left. On the opposite page, a card with the text "Yuletide Cheer" and "You warm my heart" is visible. The person's right hand, wearing a black long-sleeved shirt, then moves a pink strip of paper across the page. The logo "Stamping Julie" is faintly visible as a watermark across the bottom of the images.
